description_long: This is a tan-colored, high-ankle work boot with a rugged, lugged sole and a padded black collar around the top for added comfort. The upper is made of smooth, durable leather with double-stitched seams for reinforcement and a subtle embossed logo on the outer side. The boot features a standard criss-cross lacing system with metallic eyelets and tan laces, providing a secure fit. The toe box is rounded and reinforced, while the heel is sturdy and well-cushioned. The outsole is thick and designed for traction, making it suitable for urban environments and outdoor use. The overall construction suggests durability, comfort, and protection for the wearer.
description: A tan leather high-ankle work boot with a black padded collar, criss-cross laces, and a rugged lugged sole. It features reinforced stitching and a subtle embossed logo on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan leather upper, black padded collar, embossed logo, and rugged sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical eyelets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth leather surface, stitching details, and padded collar.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the padded black collar, heel stitching, and back seam.
attribute_logo: Embossed tree logo on the outer side near the heel, tan color.
